metadata.title: Editan Hoto Kyauta – Yanke, Canza Girma & Juyawa Cikin
metadata.description: Canza girma da yankan hotuna cikin dakiƙu. Ƙayyadadden tsare-tsare don Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn. Juya JPG zuwa WebP. Ƙirƙiri hotunan zagaye.

hero.title: Editan Hoto Kyauta – Yanke, Canza Girma & Juyawa
hero.description: Canza girma, yanke, da juya hotuna don Instagram, Facebook, da LinkedIn. Ƙayyadadden tsare-tsare, hotunan zagaye, fitar zuwa JPG, PNG, da WebP. Sarrafa a cikin browser na gida.

software.name: Editan hoto kyauta ta yanar gizo
alternateName: Mai canza girman hoto ta yanar gizo
Mai yankan hoto ta yanar gizo
Kayan aikin hoton bayanan martaba zagaye
software.description: Editan hoto kyauta ta yanar gizo don canza girma, yanke, da juya tsari. Ƙayyadadden tsare-tsare don Instagram, Facebook, da LinkedIn. Ƙirƙirar hoton zagaye. Fitar zuwa JPG, PNG, da WebP tare da sarrafa inganci. Sarrafa a cikin browser na gida.
featureList: Canza girman hotuna zuwa kowane girma
Yanke tare da zaɓin yanki na mu'amala
Ƙayyadadden tsare-tsaren Instagram (bugu murabba'i, bugu tsaye, story, reels)
Ƙayyadadden tsare-tsaren LinkedIn (bugu, tutar bayanan martaba)
Ƙayyadadden tsare-tsaren yanar gizo (hoton OG, hero, tuta, ƙaramin hoto)
Siffofin yanke: murabba'i, murabba'i daidai, da'ira (hoton zagaye)
Grid 3x3 (doka ta kashi uku) tare da zaɓin launi
Daidaiton matsayin yanke (X, Y) tare da tsakaituwa
Sarrafa a cikin browser na gida
Kayan aiki kyauta, ba a buƙatar shiga ba

howTo.name: Yadda ake canza girma da yankan hoto don kafofin watsa labarai
howTo.description: Yadda ake canza girman hoto don Instagram (1080x1080, 1080x1350, story), Facebook, LinkedIn, da hoton OG. Juya JPG zuwa WebP da ƙirƙirar hoton zagaye.

steps.name: Ƙara hoto
steps.text: Ja fayil zuwa wurin da aka kebantar ko zaɓi hoto daga na'urar ka. Tsare-tsare da ake tallafawa: JPG, PNG, WebP.

steps.name: Zaɓi girma ko ƙayyadadden tsari
steps.text: Shigar da girman da ake nufi a cikin pixels ko zaɓi ƙayyadadden tsari (misali, bugun Instagram, murfin Facebook, hoton OG).

steps.name: Daidaita yanke
steps.text: Motsa kuma ƙara girman hoton don zaɓar mafi kyawun yanki. Yankin mai haske a cikin duban yana nuna daidai abin da za a ajiye.

steps.name: Zaɓi tsari kuma sauke
steps.text: Zaɓi tsarin fayil (JPG, PNG, ko WebP), saita ingancin matsawa, kuma sauke hoton da ya gama.

contentBlocks.title: Canza girman hotuna ta yanar gizo - yanke, juya, da matsa a cikin kayan aiki ɗaya
contentBlocks.html:
Editan hoto ta yanar gizo yana baka damar daidaita hotuna zuwa takamaiman girma cikin sauri. Za ka iya canza girman hoto zuwa kowane girman pixel, zaɓi ƙayyadadden tsari don kafofin watsa labarai, ko yanke sashen hoto tare da tsarin daidaitacce.

Ban da canza girma, kayan aikin yana ba da juya tsari (JPG, PNG, WebP), ƙirƙirar hoton zagaye, da sarrafa ingancin matsawa.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake canza girman hoto ta yanar gizo
contentBlocks.description: Gyaran hoto yana ɗaukar 'yan daƙiƙu kaɗan kawai:

items.title: 1. Ƙara hoto
items.description: Ja fayil zuwa wurin da aka kebantar ko zaɓi hoto daga na'urar ka. Tsare-tsare da ake tallafawa: JPG, PNG, WebP.

items.title: 2. Saita girma
items.description: Shigar da girma a cikin pixels ko zaɓi ƙayyadadden tsari (Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, LinkedIn, hoton OG).

items.title: 3. Sauke
items.description: Daidaita yanke, zaɓi tsarin fayil (JPG, PNG, WebP), saita inganci, kuma sauke hoton da ya gama.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake ƙara hoto
contentBlocks.html:
Kayan aikin yana karɓar hotuna a tsarin JPG, PNG, da WebP. Za ka iya ƙara hoto ta hanyoyi biyu:

  • Ja da sauka - ɗauki fayil daga babban fayil a kan kwamfutar ka kuma jefa shi a kan wurin ɗora fayil (wurin da ke da iyakar da ke da digo-digo).
  • Zaɓi daga na'ura - dannawa wurin ɗora fayil yana buɗe tagar zaɓin fayil.

Bayan ƙara hoto, kayan aikin yana karanta girman asali ta atomatik kuma yana nuna duban. Yanzu za ka iya ci gaba zuwa saituna na yanke.

contentBlocks.title: Saita girman da ake nufi
contentBlocks.html: A cikin shafin Girma a cikin px, kana shigar da faɗi da tsayi da hannu. Zaɓin Kiyaye daidaito yana daidaita girma na biyu ta atomatik.

contentBlocks.title: Girman hoto don Instagram, Facebook, da LinkedIn
contentBlocks.html:
Kayan aikin ya ƙunshi ƙayyadadden tsare-tsare tare da mafi kyawun girma don dandamali mafi shahara:

DandamaliTsariGirma (px)Rabo
InstagramBugu murabba'i1080 x 10801:1
InstagramBugu tsaye1080 x 13504:5
InstagramStory / Reels1080 x 19209:16
FacebookBugu1200 x 630~1.9:1
FacebookMurfin shafi820 x 360~2.3:1
LinkedInBugu1200 x 12001:1
LinkedInTutar bayanan martaba1584 x 3964:1
Hoton OGRaba hanyar haɗi1200 x 630~1.9:1

Don zaɓar ƙayyadadden tsari, canja zuwa shafin Ƙayyadadden tsare-tsare kuma danna girman da aka zaɓa. Za a yi amfani da girma ta atomatik.

contentBlocks.title: Ƙayyadadden tsare-tsare - wanne za a zaɓa?
contentBlocks.description: Kowane tsari ya dace da takamaiman buƙatun dandamali ko amfani:

items.title: Instagram - bugu murabba'i (1080×1080)
items.description: Tsarin bugu na Instagram na al'ada. Rabo 1:1. Yana aiki da kyau a cikin feed kuma yana kyau a kan waya da tebur.

items.title: Instagram - bugu tsaye (1080×1350)
items.description: Tsarin bugu tsaye (rabo 4:5). Yana ɗaukar ƙarin sarari a cikin feed fiye da murabba'i, wanda zai iya ƙara shiga.

items.title: Instagram - story / reels (1080×1920)
items.description: Tsarin tsaye na cikakken allo (rabo 9:16). Ana amfani da shi a cikin stories da reels. Yana cika dukan allon waya.

items.title: Facebook - bugu (1200×630)
items.description: Mafi kyawun tsari don bugun Facebook da hanyoyin haɗi da aka raba. Rabo kusa da 16:9.

items.title: Facebook - murfin shafi (820×360)
items.description: Hoton baya don shafin kasuwanci na Facebook. Tsarin faɗi, mai faɗi - ana iya yanke shi dabam a kan na'urori daban-daban.

items.title: LinkedIn - bugu (1200×1200)
items.description: Tsarin murabba'i don bugun LinkedIn. Yana kyau a cikin feed da kan na'urorin hannu.

items.title: LinkedIn - tutar bayanan martaba (1584×396)
items.description: Hoton baya don bayanan martaba na LinkedIn na mutum ko kamfanin. Tsarin mai faɗi sosai - sanya muhimmin abu a tsakiya a cikin yanke.

items.title: Hoton OG (1200×630)
items.description: Hoto da ake nuna lokacin raba hanyar haɗi a kan kafofin watsa labarai (Open Graph). Al'ada don Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, da sauran dandamali.

items.title: Hoton labarin (1600×900)
items.description: Tsarin faɗi da ya dace don kan labarin blog. Rabo 16:9 yana kyau a kan shafuka masu yawan rubutu.

items.title: Tutar gidan yanar gizo (1920×600)
items.description: Tsarin mai faɗi sosai don tutocin gidan yanar gizo. Yana aiki a matsayin baya ƙarƙashin kanun labarai ko a cikin sassan tayin.

items.title: Ƙaramin hoton labarin (800×600)
items.description: Ƙaramin tsari don ƙananan hotuna a kan jerin labarai, juzu'in kayayyaki, ko duba sakamakon bincike.

items.title: Sashen Hero (1920×1080)
items.description: Tsarin Full HD na cikakken allo. Ana amfani da shi a matsayin bayan babban sashe a kan shafukan gida ko shafukan tayin.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake yankan hoto
contentBlocks.html:
Bayan saita girman da ake nufi, yankin yanke na mu'amala yana bayyana a kan duban. Bangaren hoto mai haske shi ne sashen da za a ajiye - sauran an duhunta su.

Jan yanke

Kama yankin mai haske kuma ja shi zuwa kowane bangaren hoto. Ta wannan hanyar kana zaɓar wane sashe na hoton da za a fitar.

Canza girma ta hanyar hannaye

A kusurwoyin yankin yanke akwai ƙananan murabba'ai (hannaye). Jan su yana canza girman yanke - za ka iya ƙara girma ko rage shi yayin kiyaye daidaiton da aka zaɓa.

Girman duba

A cikin shafin Zoom za ka sami mai zamewa don daidaita girman duba (100–300%). Ƙimar da ta fi girma tana nufin yanke yana rufe ƙaramin sashe na hoton asali - yana da amfani lokacin da kake son yanke takamaiman cikakkun bayanan.

Daidaiton matsayi na daidai

A cikin shafin Position za ka iya saita daidaiton matsayin yanke a cikin kaso (0–100% don igiyoyin X da Y). Maɓallai na tsakaituwa suna baka damar sanya yanke a tsakiyar hoto cikin sauri.

contentBlocks.title: Siffofin yanke
contentBlocks.demoHtml: Murabba'iMurabba'i daidaiDa'ira
contentBlocks.html:
A cikin shafin Siffofin Yanke, kana zaɓar siffar hoton da za a fitar: murabba'i (tare da daidaiton da aka zaɓa), murabba'i daidai (yana tilasta 1:1), ko da'ira (tare da bayan gaskiya).

Siffar da'ira tana ƙirƙirar hoton zagaye tare da bayan gaskiya a waje da da'irar. Kayan aikin yana canja tsari zuwa PNG ko WebP ta atomatik, tun da JPG ba ya tallafawa gaskiya.

contentBlocks.title: Grid 3×3 - menene amfaninsa?
contentBlocks.html:
Grid da ke raba hoto zuwa sassa 9 daidai yana bayyana a kan yankin yanke. Wannan hangen nesa ne na dokar kashi uku - ɗaya daga cikin ƙa'idodin asali na tsarin daukar hoto.

Dokar ta ce muhimman abubuwan hoto (fuska, kayan, wurin sha'awa) ya kamata a sanya su a mahaɗin layukan grid ko kusa da su. Irin wannan tsari ya fi ƙarfi kuma yana faranta wa ido fiye da sanya batun daidai a tsakiya.

A cikin shafin Launin grid za ka iya canza launin layi (kore, fari, baƙi, ja, rawaya) domin grid ya bayyana a fili a kan hotuna daban-daban.

contentBlocks.title: Fitarwa - wane tsari za a zaɓa?

tabs.title: JPG
tabs.html:
Tsarin da ya fi shahara don hotuna. Kyakkyawan matsawa yayin kiyaye ingancin gani. Ba ya tallafawa gaskiya - za a cika bayan koyaushe da launi.

Kyakkyawan zaɓi don hotunan kayayyaki, hotunan fuska, da yawancin hotunan gidan yanar gizo. Mai zamewa na inganci (60–100%) yana sarrafa matsawa.

tabs.title: PNG
tabs.html:
Tsarin da ba shi da asara - yana kiyaye cikakken inganci, amma fayiloli sun fi girma. Yana tallafawa gaskiya (ana buƙata don siffar da'ira).

Kyakkyawan zaɓi don hotuna masu rubutu, alamomi, da hotuna da ke buƙatar gefuna masu kaifi.

tabs.title: WebP
tabs.html:
Tsarin zamani da ke haɗa fa'idodin JPG da PNG - ƙananan fayiloli, kyakkyawan inganci, tallafawa gaskiya. Dukan browsers na zamani suna tallafawa shi.

Ana ba da shawara don gidajen yanar gizo - ƙananan fayiloli suna nufin ɗaukar hoto cikin sauri.

contentBlocks.title: Rabo na girma - menene ma'anarsu?
contentBlocks.description: Rabo na girma shine alaƙar tsakanin faɗi da tsayin hoto. Ana rubuta shi a matsayin lambobi biyu da aka raba da alamar colon:

items.title: 1:1 (murabba'i)
items.description: Faɗi ya yi daidai da tsayi. Bugun Instagram murabba'i, hotunan bayanan martaba, alamomi.

items.title: 4:5 (tsaye)
items.description: Tsarin tsaye kaɗan. Bugun Instagram tsaye - yana ɗaukar ƙarin sarari a cikin feed fiye da murabba'i.

items.title: 3:2 (na gargajiya)
items.description: Daidaiton daukar hoto na gargajiya na analog. Kyamarori na dijital da yawa kuma suna amfani da wannan tsari.

items.title: 16:9 (faɗin allo)
items.description: Tsarin bidiyo na HD na al'ada, gabatarwa, da na'urar duba. YouTube, bidiyon Facebook, tutocin gidan yanar gizo.

items.title: 9:16 (tsaye cikakken allo)
items.description: Juya 16:9 - tsarin tsaye da ke cika dukan allon waya. Instagram Stories, TikTok, YouTube Shorts.

contentBlocks.title: Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi game da editan hoto

items.question: Shin editan yana iya sarrafa hotuna manya sosai?
items.answer: Eh, ko da yake sarrafa na iya zama a hankali don hotuna sama da 4000×4000 pixels - wannan ya dogara da ƙarfin na'urar da ƙwaƙwalwar browser da ke akwai. Ana yin dukan sarrafa a cikin gida, ba tare da aika fayiloli zuwa sabar ba.
items.answerSchemaText: Eh. Sarrafa na iya zama a hankali sama da 4000×4000 px. Dukan sarrafa na gida ne.

items.question: Wane tsari na fitarwa za a zaɓa - JPG, PNG, ko WebP?
items.answer: JPG kyakkyawan zaɓi ne don hotuna masu launuka da yawa da gradients - fayiloli ƙanana ne tare da kyakkyawan inganci. PNG yana kiyaye mafi girman inganci kuma yana tallafawa gaskiya (misali, hoton zagaye). WebP yana haɗa fa'idodin duka biyun - ƙananan fayiloli tare da babban inganci da tallafawa gaskiya.
items.answerSchemaText: JPG don hotuna, PNG don gaskiya, WebP yana haɗa ƙananan fayiloli tare da babban inganci.

items.question: Yaya ake ƙirƙirar hoton bayanan martaba zagaye?
items.answer: A cikin shafin Siffofin Yanke, zaɓi zaɓin Da'ira. Kayan aikin zai canja tsari zuwa PNG ko WebP ta atomatik (JPG ba ya tallafawa gaskiya). Yankin a waje da da'irar zai kasance gaskiya.
items.answerSchemaText: Zaɓi Da'ira a cikin shafin Siffofin Yanke. Yankin a waje da da'irar gaskiya ne.

items.question: Menene girman hoto don Instagram?
items.answer: Instagram yana tallafawa manyan tsare-tsare uku: bugu murabba'i (1080×1080 px, rabo 1:1), bugu tsaye (1080×1350 px, rabo 4:5), da story/reels (1080×1920 px, rabo 9:16). Kayan aikin yana da ƙayyadadden tsare-tsare don kowane ɗayan waɗannan girma.
items.answerSchemaText: Bugu murabba'i: 1080×1080 px, bugu tsaye: 1080×1350 px, story/reels: 1080×1920 px.

items.question: Yaya mai zamewa na inganci ke aiki?
items.answer: Mai zamewa na inganci (60–100%) yana sarrafa matakin matsawa don tsarin JPG da WebP. Ƙimar da ta fi girma tana nufin mafi kyawun ingancin hoto amma girman fayil mafi girma. Don yawancin amfani da kafofin watsa labarai, ƙimar da ta fi dacewa shine 70–85%.
items.answerSchemaText: Mai zamewa yana sarrafa matsawa na JPG da WebP. 70–85% ya fi dacewa don kafofin watsa labarai.

items.question: Me ya sa tsarin JPG ba ya samuwa tare da siffar da'ira?
items.answer: Tsarin JPG ba ya tallafawa gaskiya. Siffar da'ira tana buƙatar bayan gaskiya a waje da da'irar, don haka kayan aikin yana iyakance zaɓin zuwa PNG ko WebP ta atomatik - tsare-tsare masu tashar alpha.
items.answerSchemaText: JPG ba ya tallafawa gaskiya. Siffar da'ira tana buƙatar PNG ko WebP.

items.question: Menene ma'anar rabo na girma kamar 4:5 ko 16:9?
items.answer: Rabo na girma yana bayyana alaƙar tsakanin faɗi da tsayin hoto. Misali, 4:5 yana nufin faɗi sassa 4 ne kuma tsayi sassa 5 ne. 16:9 shine rabo na al'ada don fina-finai da gabatarwa. Bugun Instagram tsaye yana amfani da 4:5, yayin da story da reels ke amfani da 9:16.
items.answerSchemaText: 4:5 = faɗi sassa 4, tsayi sassa 5. 16:9 = faɗin allo na al'ada.
